target.baseline_command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/eig_48x48_f64

lever.description: Pinned a general Primitive::Eig conformance contract before the shifted/deflated packed-Hessenberg QR implementation. The contract covers real diagonal-dominant, nonsymmetric real, repeated, near-repeated, complex-conjugate, and 3x3 diagonal-deflation cases.

isomorphism.reason: Only fj-conformance oracle tests changed; no runtime, dispatch, or linalg implementation code changed.
isomorphism.ordering: Public Eig output order remains unspecified. The golden summary canonicalizes only for proof reporting using real-desc, imag-desc, original-index tie.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: Repeated and near-repeated cases are checked as unordered multisets with explicit tolerance slots; canonical ordering is proof-only.
isomorphism.floating_point: The production Eig arithmetic is untouched. The contract checks eigenvalue multisets, Complex128 dtype/shape, and Av=lambda*v residuals for real cases at fixed tolerances.

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-conformance --test linalg_oracle eig -- --nocapture
rch exec -- cargo clippy -q -p fj-conformance --test linalg_oracle -- -D warnings

validation.summary: Package-level fmt also reports a pre-existing unrelated formatting diff in crates/fj-conformance/tests/gather_scatter_oracle.rs. The touched linalg_oracle.rs file passes rustfmt --check.
UBS reports existing test-file panic/assert/direct-index inventories; embedded fmt/clippy/check/test subchecks were clean.

performance_result.reason: Contract-only gate; no production performance lever was kept in this commit. The next profile-backed lever is shifted/deflated packed-Hessenberg QR against the 17.692 ms eig_48 baseline, target >=2x.

next_primitive: Shifted and deflated QR over a packed real Hessenberg layout, harvested from communication-avoiding / blocked eigensolver primitives.
